# Land Cover

<!-- # ```{r setup} -->
<!-- # #| echo: false -->
<!-- # #| warning: false -->
<!-- # #| message: false -->
<!-- # #| results: hide -->
<!-- # here::i_am("atlas-mnhnl.Rproj") -->
<!-- # source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "0_Initialisation.R")) -->
<!-- # source(here::here("Atlas", "code", "LandOverMap.R")) -->
<!-- # ``` -->

## Map

<!-- # ```{r altitude} -->
<!-- # #| echo: false -->
<!-- # #| warning: false  -->
<!-- # #| message: false  -->
<!-- # plot_land_cover(DATAPATH)  -->
<!-- # ```  -->
